title: PvP to the Max
description: just another performance modpack for pvp
body:
This is a **PvP-focused performance modpack** designed to improve FPS **without reducing visual quality**. Instead of lowering graphics, the pack focuses on optimization mods that help Minecraft run smoother while keeping the game looking good.

The modpack also includes several **UI improvements and small visual enhancements** that slightly improve the UI and make the game look better

All mods are **client-side**, so the pack works on vanilla servers without requiring server-side mods.

# 
### Performance:
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [ParticleCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)

# 
### UI / Visual Improvements:
- [Handful](https://modrinth.com/mod/handful)
- [Immersive Hotbar](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-hotbar)
- [Scoreboard Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/scoreboard-overhaul)
- [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor)
- [Smooth Swapping](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping)
- and more

# 
### ResourcePacks:
- [Light Rain](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/light-rain)
- [Real Nature Sky](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/real-anime-sky)
- [Shadify](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shadify)
- [PvP Swords](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/short-pvp-swords)
- [Small Crosshair [v2]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-crosshair-v2)
- ...
